title: ageratina durangensis
intro: Ageratina durangensis, also known as the Durango ageratina, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ageratina durangensis include relief from pain, fever reduction, and the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
